# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

As this is a **Proof of Concept (POC)** project for presentation purposes, only the latest version of the `main` branch is actively monitored.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| main    | :white_check_mark: |
| < main  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do **not** open a public issue. 
Instead, please report it via one of the following:

1. **GitHub Private Reporting:** Use the "Report a vulnerability" button in the Security tab of this repository.
2. **Contact:** Reach out directly to the maintainer via the email listed on their GitHub profile.

We will acknowledge your report and provide a timeline for a fix within 72 hours.
